title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | June 22, 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Auto-component micro-motors; wait for results, don't rush
recommendations.detail: Kutumba Rao said Igarashi is not one of the good stocks in the auto-component space. It makes micro-motors, such as those that operate windshield wiper blades, but its performance over the last two-three quarters has not been inspiring. He advised waiting to see this quarter's results and not rushing in.

recommendations.price: stop loss near 158-159; else wait till ~160
recommendations.note: Near 52-week high after doubling; wait for results or buy with stop only if daring
recommendations.detail: Kutumba Rao noted Ind Swift Labs has roughly doubled recently and is near its 52-week high. He prefers to wait and watch and buy after the quarterly results. A momentum buy would need a stop loss, but the stop (near 158-159) is far away, so he would only buy at current levels if one dares; otherwise wait till around 160 to buy.
